top_signals.title: MSCI Flags South Korea Market Hurdles Ahead of Key Review
top_signals.summary: South Korea is yet to resolve several key obstacles facing foreign investors, MSCI Inc. said in its latest market accessibility review, a setback for global funds and the government hoping the country’s reform drive could pave the way toward a future upgrade to developed-market status.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Geely seeks to double Zeekr sales abroad, eyeing Malaysia output
Hyperliquid poised to become more than an exchange and drive HYPE higher, Hyperion CEO says
top_signals.summary: Hyperion CEO argued investors are still underestimating the decentralized exchange's transformation into a broader blockchain ecosystem.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
